violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The floors under the shelving in the back of the kitchen and under the cashier area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The establishment does not have an allergen statement visible for the public. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation debris: 1.food cart observed with food residue and other debris. 2.shelves throughout kitchen have an accumulation of food residue and/or grease. 3.ice machine vents observed with dust. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The outside refuse area have an accumulation of food debris, trash, litter, and other debris. The refuse areas shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The floors under/behind equipment throughout the facility and walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue ,food debris, other debris, and/or grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
